description_long: This gondola is a slender, elongated wooden boat with a gently curved hull, docked at a wooden pier beside a brick-walled structure. The vessel features a dark, polished finish and is equipped with a single oar resting across its width, typical of Venetian gondolas. The passenger compartment is open, with simple bench seating and no visible upholstery or decorative elements. The prow and stern are both slightly raised, but there is no elaborate ornamentation or metalwork at the tips. The surrounding scene includes water, barrels, and dock accessories, enhancing the authentic canal-side atmosphere. The gondola appears functional and ready for use, with a utilitarian design focused on practicality rather than luxury.
description: A long, dark wooden gondola with an open passenger area and simple bench seating, docked beside a brick building and wooden pier. The boat is unadorned, with a single oar and no canopy or decorative features.
description_view_0: The gondola is seen from the side, showing its length, the open passenger area, and the adjacent dock and brick wall.
description_view_1: A frontal view highlights the pointed prow of the gondola, the oar across the boat, and the full dock setup with barrels and accessories.
description_view_2: The rear and side of the gondola are visible, showing the stern, the bench seating, and the water surface extending from the dock.
description_view_3: The gondola is mostly obscured by the brick wall, with only a small portion of the boat and dock visible from behind.
attribute_passenger_compartment_design: The passenger compartment is open and minimally decorated, featuring simple wooden bench seating without upholstery or armrests. The design is utilitarian, with no visible enclosure or decorative trim.
attribute_oarlock_type: A simple wooden oarlock (forcola) is visible, shaped to cradle the oar and made from the same dark wood as the boat.
attribute_seating_arrangement: The gondola has a single bench seat positioned centrally within the open compartment, with no cushions or backrests visible.
